gt_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.Id) FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.OwnerUserId WHERE T1.Location = 'United Kingdom' AND T2.FavoriteCount >= 4
pred_sql:
SELECT COUNT(T1.Id) 
FROM users AS T1 
JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.OwnerUserId 
WHERE TRIM(T1.Location) = 'United Kingdom' 
AND T2.FavoriteCount >= 4;
question: Among the users located in United Kingdom, how many users whose post have a total favorite amount of 4 or more?
